description: isValidTier('solo') returns true
isValidTier('pro') and isValidTier('premium') still return true
isValidTier('invalid') returns false
TENANT_TIERS contains ['solo', 'pro', 'premium'] in order
TIER_LABELS.solo equals 'Solo'
TIER_RANK maps solo=0, pro=1, premium=2
tierAtLeast('solo', 'solo') returns true
tierAtLeast('solo', 'pro') returns false
tierAtLeast('pro', 'solo') returns true
tierAtLeast('premium', 'pro') returns true
tierAtLeast('pro', 'premium') returns false
resolveTier('solo') returns { tier: 'solo', isMisconfigured: false }
resolveTier(null) defaults to { tier: 'pro', isMisconfigured: false }
resolveTier('invalid') defaults to pro with isMisconfigured: true
tierHasFeature('solo', INTEGRATIONS) returns false
tierHasFeature('pro', INTEGRATIONS) returns true
tierHasFeature('premium', INTEGRATIONS) returns true
tierHasFeature('solo', EXTENSIONS) returns false
tierHasFeature('pro', EXTENSIONS) returns true
tierHasFeature('solo', MANAGED_EMAIL) returns false
tierHasFeature('solo', SSO) returns false
tierHasFeature('solo', ADVANCED_ASSETS) returns false
tierHasFeature('solo', CLIENT_PORTAL_ADMIN) returns false
tierHasFeature('solo', WORKFLOW_DESIGNER) returns false
tierHasFeature('solo', MOBILE_ACCESS) returns false
tierHasFeature('pro', MOBILE_ACCESS) returns true
tierHasFeature('solo', ENTRA_SYNC) returns false (premium feature)
tierHasFeature('pro', ENTRA_SYNC) returns false (premium feature)
tierHasFeature('premium', ENTRA_SYNC) returns true
TIER_FEATURE_MAP['solo'] is empty array (no features at solo level)
TIER_FEATURE_MAP['pro'] contains all 8 pro-minimum features
TIER_FEATURE_MAP['premium'] contains all 11 features (8 pro + 3 premium)
ADD_ONS.AI_ASSISTANT equals 'ai_assistant'
ADD_ON_LABELS[AI_ASSISTANT] equals 'AI Assistant'
tenantHasAddOn(['ai_assistant'], ADD_ONS.AI_ASSISTANT) returns true
tenantHasAddOn([], ADD_ONS.AI_ASSISTANT) returns false
getActiveAddOns returns only non-expired add-ons from tenant_addons table
getActiveAddOns returns empty array when no add-ons exist for tenant
getActiveAddOns excludes expired add-ons (expires_at < now)
assertAddOnAccess throws when tenant lacks the requested add-on
assertAddOnAccess passes when tenant has the requested add-on
assertAddOnAccess bypasses check in CE edition (never throws)
assertAddOnAccess works for Solo tier with AI add-on active
assertAddOnAccess works for Pro tier with AI add-on active
assertAddOnAccess works for Premium tier with AI add-on active
TierContext provides isSolo=true when tier is solo
TierContext provides isSolo=false when tier is pro
TierContext provides addOns array from session/DB
TierContext hasAddOn returns true when add-on is in addOns array
TierContext hasAddOn returns false when add-on is not in addOns array
CE edition: hasAddOn always returns true regardless of addOns array
CE edition: hasFeature always returns true regardless of tier
MenuItem interface accepts optional requiredFeature field
Sidebar hides Extensions item for Solo tier
Sidebar hides Workflow Editor subitem for Solo tier
Sidebar shows Extensions item for Pro tier
Sidebar shows all items for Premium tier
Sidebar items without requiredFeature are always shown
Settings Integrations tab shows FeatureUpgradeNotice for Solo tier
Settings Extensions tab shows FeatureUpgradeNotice for Solo tier
Settings Email tab shows FeatureUpgradeNotice for Solo tier
Settings tabs remain visible and clickable even when gated
Settings Integrations tab shows normal content for Pro tier
Settings sidebar items are never filtered by tier (all visible)
assertTierAccess(INTEGRATIONS) throws for Solo tenant
assertTierAccess(INTEGRATIONS) passes for Pro tenant
assertTierAccess(EXTENSIONS) throws for Solo tenant
assertAddOnAccess(AI_ASSISTANT) throws for tenant without AI add-on
assertAddOnAccess(AI_ASSISTANT) passes for Solo tenant with AI add-on
exchangeOttForSession rejects Solo tenant with 403 status
exchangeOttForSession 403 response includes upgrade message
exchangeOttForSession succeeds for Pro tenant
exchangeOttForSession succeeds for Premium tenant
stripeTierMapping maps 'alga-psa-solo' to 'solo'
getTierPriceIds('solo') returns basePriceId with userPriceId: null
getTierPriceIds('pro') still returns both basePriceId and userPriceId
Solo checkout creates session with single line item (base price only)
Pro checkout still creates session with two line items (base + per-user)
handleCheckoutCompleted sets licensed_user_count=1 for Solo tier
handleSubscriptionUpdated sets licensed_user_count=1 for Solo tier
upgradeTier Solo->Pro adds per-user line item to subscription
upgradeTier Solo->Pro swaps base price from Solo to Pro
downgradeTier Pro->Solo succeeds when active user count = 1
downgradeTier Pro->Solo fails when active user count > 1
downgradeTier Pro->Solo removes per-user line item
downgradeTier Pro->Solo swaps base price from Pro to Solo
purchaseAddOn(AI_ASSISTANT) creates checkout for AI add-on subscription item
cancelAddOn(AI_ASSISTANT) removes AI line item from subscription
Stripe webhook inserts tenant_addons row when AI subscription activates
Stripe webhook deactivates tenant_addons row when AI subscription is cancelled
addUser action rejects when plan='solo' and used >= 1 internal users
addUser action returns correct error message for Solo limit
addUser action allows adding first user on Solo plan
addUser action allows adding users on Pro plan without Solo limit
Add User button is disabled when isSolo in user management UI
Add User button shows upgrade CTA when disabled for Solo
FEATURE_DISPLAY_NAMES has entries for all 8 new tier features
AccountManagement shows Solo-specific messaging for solo tier
AccountManagement shows 'Upgrade to Pro' card for Solo tenants
AccountManagement shows 'Downgrade to Solo' for Pro tenants with 1 user
AccountManagement hides 'Downgrade to Solo' for Pro tenants with 2+ users
AccountManagement shows 'Add AI Assistant' card when add-on not active
AccountManagement shows 'AI Assistant (active)' when add-on is active
AI add-on card appears for Solo tier (not just Pro/Premium)
upgradeTierAction supports Solo -> Pro flow
downgradeTierAction validates user count before downgrading
npm run build:shared compiles with all new types/features/add-ons
Solo checkout session includes trialDays=7
Pro checkout does not include trial unless explicitly requested
Solo->Pro trial activates for established Solo customer (subscriptionStatus='active', past trial)
Solo->Pro trial blocked when Solo customer is still in their 7-day trial (subscriptionStatus='trialing')
Solo->Pro trial grants access to all Pro tier features during trial period
Solo->Pro trial reverts to Solo when trial expires without conversion
'Try Pro free' CTA shown for established Solo customers in AccountManagement
'Try Pro free' CTA hidden when Solo customer is still in their trial
